basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Controller and Audit Officer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years. Relaxation in upper age limit as per Punjab Govt. Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Commerce Graduation / Master's degree in Commerce/Economics from a recognized University. Must have passed SAS held by the Comptroller & Auditor General of India/State Finance Deptt; with at least 15 years experience of Accounts in a University / Govt. Deptt./ Educational Institution
qualification.details: Assistant Controller (F&A) / Audit Officer: Commerce Graduation / Master's degree in Commerce/Economics from a recognized University. Must have passed SAS held by the Comptroller & Auditor General of India/State Finance Deptt; with at least 15 years experience of Accounts in a University / Govt. Deptt./ Educational Institution.

selection_process: Written Test Merit based on written test and experience marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the BFUHS Recruitment 2026 is 10-07-2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by BFUHS?
faq.answer: BFUHS has released a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Assistant Controller (F&A) and Audit Officer.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Controller (F&A) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Commerce Graduation or Master's degree in Commerce/Economics from a recognized University and have passed SAS. A minimum of 15 years of experience in accounts is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 37 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Punjab Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the BFUHS posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, followed by merit based on the written test and experience marks, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is Rs. 2360/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any relaxation in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, relaxation in the upper age limit is provided as per the Punjab Government Rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will be as per the 7th CPC (Central Pay Commission).

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, candidates must apply online through the official website of BFUHS. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BFUHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
